summary: Integrated all detectors into Pulse workflow and created Watts Principles documentation. Pulse now runs pre-build safety checks (impossibility audit + prompt lint), monitors for plateaued Drops during execution, and checks for contradictions when adding learnings.
decisions: Added pre_build_safety_checks() function to pulse.py that runs impossibility audit and prompt lint
Integrated sentinel_plateau_check() into tick() for ongoing monitoring
Modified add_learning() in pulse_learnings.py to run contradiction detector before adding
All imports use try/except for graceful fallback if detectors unavailable
Plateau check throttled to 1 alert per Drop per 10 minutes to avoid spam
learnings: Pulse integration requires graceful fallback for missing detectors (try/except on imports)
Plateau detection threshold of 0.85 for semantic similarity works well for detecting spinning
Pre-build safety checks should add less than 5 seconds to build start
notes_for_orchestrator:
All four detectors integrated:
1. Impossibility Audit (D2.1) - runs pre-build, blocks on high-severity
2. Contradiction Detector (D2.2) - runs on learning additions, blocks conflicts
3. Prompt Lint (D2.3) - runs pre-build on all briefs, blocks below score 70
4. Plateau Detector (D2.4) - runs during sentinel monitoring, alerts with tooling suggestions

Documentation created at N5/prefs/principles/ for reference.
